PRO membership

Empower your Web3 experience with premium insights, tailored Alerts, and an engaged community - all through a staking-based membership.

What you get:

Premium content

Gain early access to exclusive research, analysis, and reports.

Gain early access to exclusive research and reports.

Boosting power

Enhance your dapp's visibility and growth.

Enhanced data

Get shorter timeframes and additional filter options.

Custom Alerts

Unlock custom, multi-chain, and multi-category Alerts.

Advanced filters

Use multiple filters at once on DappRadar Rankings.

Downloadable CSV

Download and share the extensive historical data.

DappRadar PRO
Powerful, staking-based membership
Claim PRO, and get at least 30000 RADAR
A 30-day cooldown applies to all unstaking actions.

FAQ

What is DappRadar PRO?
DappRadar PRO is a premium membership that users can access by locking their RADAR tokens. PRO gives users access to enhanced features, more data, dapp boosting, custom alerts, and much more.
What is the DappRadar token? (RADAR)
RADAR is the governance and utility token for the DappRadar ecosystem, empowering users and dapp developers alike by giving them more tools and a voice in the future of the World’s Dapp Store.
How do I activate DappRadar PRO?
Users can activate their DappRadar PRO premium membership by locking 30,000 RADAR tokens on the DappRadar platform. Connect your Web3 wallet with your locked RADAR to your DappRadar account to gain access to PRO.
How do I cancel DappRadar PRO?
Users can cancel their PRO membership at any time, after which the tokens will remain locked for 30 days. At any given time, users can override their cancellation by pressing “Remain PRO” and executing a transaction. They can then continue to enjoy the benefits of the DappRadar PRO premium membership.
Why is there a cooldown period when unstaking?
DappRadar PRO is free of charge, and users will always get their RADAR tokens back. While using the PRO membership, users even earn extra tokens. The 30-day cooldown makes the PRO membership resemble a monthly membership for a service or magazine, and this also reduces the number of people who want PRO for a short period of time. During the cooldown period, users will still have access to all features of the PRO membership.

PRO is provided to users as a benefit from staking RADAR tokens. After you end your staking, you will always get your RADAR tokens back.
Where can I get RADAR tokens?
RADAR tokens can be bought from decentralized exchanges such as SushiSwap (ETH) and ApeSwap (BNB). Various centralized exchanges also list RADAR, including OKX, Crypto.com, Gate.io and MEXC. However, users need to transfer their RADAR to a non-custodial wallet to activate PRO. It’s not possible to gain access to PRO when the RADAR tokens are stored on a centralized exchange.
Can I buy RADAR with a payment card?
Presently, it’s not possible to buy RADAR with a credit card or bank card. However, using the Buy Crypto feature in your DappRadar Account will allow you to purchase ETH or BNB. After that, you can swap your acquired crypto for RADAR on both Ethereum and BNB Chain using DappRadar’s Token Swap feature.
What is staking?
Staking is a financial strategy to earn rewards by locking up assets. For example, by staking a cryptocurrency, users can earn extra cryptocurrencies.
What is Boosting Power, and why is it useful?
Every DappRadar user who locks RADAR tokens, receives Boosting Power. Using these points, users can promote their favorite dapp and make it stand out within the DappRadar ecosystem.
What is compounding and why is auto-compounding enabled?
Compounding takes place when the rewards on staked assets are automatically applied to the staked assets. Auto-compounding benefits the user and creates a smooth user experience.
What is harvesting?
Harvesting is a synonym for claiming, meaning that participants can claim rewards for certain activity in a Web3 project, i.e. staking.
How do I use the PRO NFT?
The PRO NFT is a digital asset on the blockchain (a non-fungible token, or NFT) that gives users access to the DappRadar PRO membership. Simply keep the NFT in your noncustodial wallet, and connect that wallet to the DappRadar platform. The system will recognize the PRO NFT in your wallet, and shows you information about the PRO NFT, including the expiring date. Alongside using the PRO NFT, users can still stake RADAR to get an APR and Boosting Power.
What is APR?
APR is an acronym for Annual Percentage Rate. APR is the yearly rate of interest that an individual must pay on a loan, or that they receive on a deposit account.
What is a wallet?
A wallet is a digital storage space for cryptocurrencies and non-fungible tokens. Generally, a crypto wallet consists of two keys; the public key or wallet address, and a private key. Wallets can be generated through software (i.e. MetaMask or Wallet Connect) or hardware (i.e. Ledger or Trezor).
